name: components/icons
description: A curated set of 60+ inline SVG icon components designed for the shadcn-solid design system. Each icon is a lightweight SolidJS component that accepts standard SVG props and automatically applies consistent stroke width, currentColor fill, and size-4 default sizing. Covers UI essentials (arrows, actions, status, brands, device types) with no external icon-library dependency.
useCases: Navigation and breadcrumb chevrons, home, and menu icons
Action buttons for download, upload, copy, trash, and external-link operations
Status indicators using check, alert-triangle, circle-check, and loader spinner icons
Brand and social icons (Github, Google, Apple, Instagram, Youtube, X, Paypal, Reddit) for auth and marketing
usage: import { IconCheck, IconChevronDown, IconSearch, IconTrash, IconUser, IconPlus, IconLogo, IconSettings, /* 60+ named exports */ } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/icons"
